description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and an open, spacious layout. The structure features large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. The exterior is finished in light wood paneling, complemented by landscaped greenery, including several trees and shrubs. A prominent swimming pool and patio area are situated at the rear, surrounded by lounge seating and decorative planters. The front includes a driveway with parking spaces and a small garden, while the side wings house additional rooms and covered outdoor spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimalism, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with extensive glass windows, wood paneling, landscaped gardens, and a rear swimming pool. The layout is open and spacious, blending indoor and outdoor living.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow's main entrance, driveway, and front garden, with a clear view of the central tree and the open-plan living area.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the rear of the bungalow, showcasing the swimming pool, patio, and outdoor lounge areas, as well as the extensive use of glass and greenery.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a perspective of the side wing, visible parking spaces, and the transition from the driveway to the main living spaces, with the pool and garden in the background.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the opposite side, displaying the garage, additional parking, and the linear arrangement of rooms along the front facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
